flags.summary: In-state tuition at Taylor University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.6k → $40.5k).

flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Taylor University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.6k → $40.5k).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Taylor University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Taylor University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 2.0k).
